# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud database security.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "sqladmin"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      sslEnforcement: "Enabled"
      minimalTlsVersion: "TLS1_2"
    resources:
      - type: "databases"
        apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
        name: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
        properties:
          edition: "Standard"
          requestedServiceObjective: "S1"
          maxSizeBytes: "2147483648" # 2 GB
      - type: "firewallRules"
        apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
        name: "AllowAzureServices"
        properties:
          startIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
          endIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
      - type: "firewallRules"
        apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
        name: "DevIP1"
        properties:
          startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIp1')]"
          endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIp1')]"
      - type: "firewallRules"
        apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
        name: "DevIP2"
        properties:
          startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIp2')]"
          endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIp2')]"

parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the SQL server."
  databaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the SQL database."
  location:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The Azure region for the resources."
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: "The password for the SQL admin user."
  devIp1:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Development IP address 1."
  devIp2:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Development IP address 2."
